hint: When the Civil Protection officer knocks over the can and tells you to put it in the trash, pick it up and throw it directly at his face.
When the Civil Protection officer knocks over the can, pick it up and place it into the nearby trash can.

description: Escape the apartment block raid.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Run from the Combine through the apartment complex and over the rooftops.

description: Break the mini-teleporter in Kleiner's lab.
hint: Inside Dr. Kleiner's lab, find the mini-teleporter on the desk. Repeatedly teleport the cactus or books until the machine sparks and breaks.

description: Get the crowbar.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Barney will drop this to you just after you get your HEV suit.

description: Kill five barnacles with one barrel.
hint: Near the start of the canals, there is a ramp with a red explosive barrel at the top and a bridge covered in Barnacles below. Roll the barrel down the ramp so they grab it, then shoot it.

description: Get the airboat.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. You receive this vehicle at Station 20.

description: Get the airboat's mounted gun.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. A Vortigaunt will install a Combine chopper gun onto your airboat.

description: Discover the hidden singing vortigaunt cave in chapter Water Hazard.
hint: Right after destroying the Hunter-Chopper, you will open a large gate. Before passing through, look for a large drainage pipe hidden behind two grates on the left wall of the cliff. Run through the toxic sludge into the cave.

description: Destroy the hunter-chopper in Half-Life 2.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Defeat the chopper boss at the end of the airboat section using your mounted gun.

description: Find the HEV Suit Charger faceplate in Eli's scrapyard.
hint: While Alyx is opening the door to the scrapyard, look around the shelves to your left to find a destroyed HEV charger from Half-Life 1.

description: Get the Gravity Gun in Black Mesa East.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Alyx will hand this to you before introducing you to Dog.

description: Use DOG's ball to make a basket in Eli's scrapyard.
hint: During the Gravity Gun tutorial with Dog, look up at the scrapyard walls. There is a makeshift basketball hoop attached to a panel. Shoot Dog's Rollermine ball through it.

description: Play through Ravenholm using only the Gravity Gun.
hint: From the moment you enter Ravenholm until you exit the mines to meet the resistance fighters, do not fire a single weapon, swing the crowbar, or use grenades. Only use the Gravity Gun to throw sawblades, explosive barrels, and objects at enemies.
Unmissable story achievement. Escort Father Grigori through the graveyard.

description: Kill 3 enemies using the crane.
hint: When you use the large magnetic crane to move your buggy, use it to pick up shipping containers and drop them on the Combine soldiers attacking you.

description: Pin a soldier to the billboard in chapter Highway 17.
hint: Just after getting the Crossbow, you'll see a Combine soldier standing on a catwalk directly in front of a billboard. Shoot him with a crossbow bolt to pin his ragdoll to the board.
Unmissable story achievement. Shoot down the Gunship attacking NLO (New Little Odessa) using the RPG provided by Odessa Cubbage.

description: Destroy six gunships in Half-Life 2.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Destroy all 6 Combine Gunships encountered during the campaign. They are mandatory boss fights.

description: Cross the antlion beach in chapter Sandtraps without touching the sand.
hint: Use the Gravity Gun to move wooden pallets, doors, and rocks to create a bridge for yourself. Save often! The achievement triggers once you reach the rocky cliff where the Antlion Guard spawns.

description: Use the antlions to kill 50 enemies.
hint: Use the Pheropod (Bugbait) to direct your infinite squad of Antlions to attack Combine soldiers in Nova Prospekt.

description: Kill an enemy with a toilet.
hint: Inside the prison cells of Nova Prospekt, use the Gravity Gun to pick up a broken toilet and launch it at a Combine soldier's head.

description: Survive the second turret standoff in Nova Prospekt.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Survive the long Combine ambush alongside Alyx using the deployable turrets.

description: Gain command of a squad of rebels in the uprising.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Met shortly after Dog takes down the Combine Dropship.

description: Get through the toxic tunnel under City 17 in Half-Life 2.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Navigate the underground toxic waste filled tunnels.

description: Survive the generator plaza standoff in chapter Anticitizen One.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Survive the wave of Combine soldiers while waiting for Alyx to disable the forcefield generator.

description: Kill all of the snipers in City 17.
hint: Toss grenades or launch explosive barrels with the Gravity Gun into every sniper window (blue lasers) you encounter in the street level.

description: Shut down the supression device by disabling its generators.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Use Combine energy balls to overload the generators in the Overwatch Nexus building.

description: Survive the rooftop strider battle in the ruins of City 17.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Defeat the Striders attacking the rebel outpost to clear the path to the Citadel.

description: Disintegrate 15 soldiers by throwing them into a Combine ball field.
hint: Inside the Citadel, your Gravity Gun is overcharged. Use it to grab Combine soldiers and throw them directly into the large pillars of light/energy balls.
Unmissable story achievement. Destroy the reactor at the top of the Citadel to complete Half-Life 2.

description: Find all lambda caches in Half-Life 2.
hint: There are 45 hidden Lambda symbol spray-paints marking secret supply caches across the entire game. Keep an eye out for yellow symbols.

description: Kill five enemies with a Manhack.
hint: Catch a flying Manhack with your Gravity Gun and launch it at Combine soldiers or Zombies. Repeat 5 times.

description: Make it to the bottom of the Citadel's main elevator shaft in one piece.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Survive the falling debris in the elevator shaft while riding down with Alyx.

description: Contain the Citadel core.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Reactivate the containment bridges using energy balls.

description: Contain the Citadel core without killing any stalkers.
hint: During the core stabilization puzzles, the Stalkers will constantly destroy your energy balls. You must out-speed them or block their lasers without killing them.

description: Use the cars to squash 15 antlions in Episode One.
hint: In the underground garage area where Antlions spawn infinitely from burrows, use the Gravity Gun to slam the wrecked cars into them before plugging the holes.

description: Survive long enough to get on the parking garage elevator.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Hold off the massive zombie horde in pitch darkness until the elevator arrives.

description: Help Alyx snipe 30 enemies in Episode One.
hint: When Alyx mounts the sniper rifle to cover you, avoid killing enemies yourself. Instead, bait the zombies into her line of sight so she can shoot them.

description: Destroy the gunship in the hospital attic.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Use the RPG to shoot down the Combine Gunship destroying the roof.

description: Don't let any citizens die when escorting them to the escape train.
hint: Save often. When escorting the groups of rebels to the train station, take point and quickly eliminate all Combine soldiers and snipers before they can shoot the rebels.

description: Escape City 17 with Alyx.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Defeat the final Strider and board the escape train.

description: Finish the game firing exactly one bullet. Grenade, crowbar, rocket, and Gravity Gun kills are okay!
hint: Play through the entirety of Episode 1 without firing a gun (pistol, shotgun, SMG, AR2). You MUST use your single allowed bullet to shoot off the padlock in the chapter 'Lowlife'.

description: Kill five enemies with the same energy ball.
hint: Grab a bouncing energy ball with the Gravity Gun and launch it down a narrow hallway filled with Combine soldiers. Inside the Citadel is the best place to do this.

description: Kill an Elite Soldier with his own energy ball.
hint: Combine Elite soldiers (the ones in white armor) shoot energy balls from their AR2s. Catch one with your Gravity Gun and throw it straight back at him.

description: Use flares to light 15 zombies on fire.
hint: In the pitch-black underground areas, pick up the red glowing flares with your Gravity Gun and throw them at Zombies. Kills are not required, just igniting them.

description: Kill an acid antlion worker.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. You will encounter these glowing green, acid-spitting Antlions in the mine shafts.

description: Squish every antlion grub in Episode Two.
chapter: To the White Forest / This Vortal Coil (EP2)
hint: There are exactly 333 glowing grubs hidden throughout the Antlion caves. You must step on, shoot, or smash every single one. Save often and check every corner.

description: Find and break every web cache in Episode Two.
chapter: To the White Forest / This Vortal Coil (EP2)
hint: There are 9 item caches stuck inside Antlion webbing. You must break open all of them. Most are hidden slightly off the main path in the mines.

description: Help Griggs and Sheckley hold off the antlion invasion inside the mine shaft.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Survive the massive multi-tunnel Antlion defense sequence using the auto-turrets.

description: Defeat both antlion guards outside the White Forest.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. You must defeat both the standard and glowing Antlion Guards in the large arena before getting the car.

description: Run over 20 enemies with the car in Episode Two.
hint: While driving the Muscle Car, intentionally run over Combine soldiers, Zombies, and Hunters on the road.

description: Survive the Hunter ambush with Alyx.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Defeat the Hunters that ambush you at the radio communications building.

description: Defeat the chopper in Episode Two without any misses.
hint: During the boss fight where you must throw the Chopper's own mines back at it with the Gravity Gun, ensure that every single mine you throw connects and deals damage.

description: Destroy the Combine Autogun in the junkyard.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Sneak through the junkyard cover and throw an explosive into the Autogun.

description: Find every radar cache in chapter Under The Radar.
hint: After the rebel mechanic fixes your car's radar, you must track down and open all 5 hidden rebel supply caches marked by the radar pings.

description: Beat DOG in a race to the White Forest base.
hint: When Dog challenges you to a race back to the base, drive flawlessly and boost to beat him to the finish line.

description: Unlock the rocket launcher lambda cache in chapter Under The Radar.
hint: When you find the cache hidden high up in a hanging basket, use a grenade or explosive barrel to blow the grate off the bottom to drop the supplies.

description: Survive the ambush at White Forest Inn.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Defeat the massive Combine force that traps you in the Inn.

description: Send the garden gnome into space.
hint: At the start of Chapter 2 (communications building), find the Gnome under a bed. You must physically carry him using the Gravity Gun through the ENTIRE rest of the game and place him inside the rocket hatch at White Forest.

description: Secure the launch doors on missile silo 2.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Clear the Combine soldiers out of the silo to allow the rocket to be prepped.

description: Save all buildings outside the missile silo from destruction.
hint: During the massive final battle against the Striders and Hunters, you must use Magnusson Devices to destroy every single Strider before they shoot their warp-cannon at any of the rebel outpost buildings.

description: Save the missile silo from the Combine offensive.
hint: Unmissable story achievement. Defeat all the Striders and watch the rocket launch.

description: Kill a Hunter with its own flechettes.
hint: Use the Gravity Gun to pick up a large physics object (like a tire or barrel). Hold it like a shield while a Hunter shoots it with explosive flechettes, then throw the object back at the Hunter.

description: Kill 30 enemies with thrown physics objects.
hint: Use the Gravity Gun to launch sawblades, radiators, barrels, and cinderblocks into enemies. You will easily get this in Ravenholm.

description: Kill an enemy by planting a hopper mine.
hint: Use the Gravity Gun to pluck a Combine Hopper Mine out of the ground, then place it back down to reprogram it to your side. Lure an enemy into it.

description: Kill a Combine soldier with his own grenade.
hint: When a Combine soldier throws a frag grenade at you, use the Gravity Gun to catch it mid-air and throw it right back at him.

description: Steal a Zombine's grenade.
hint: When a Combine Zombie (Zombine) pulls out a live grenade to suicide bomb you, use the Gravity Gun to snatch it out of their hand.

description: If you are reading this achievement, Gabe Newell has successfully launched Gnome Chompski into space. If you did not also receive the achievement 'Manufacturing Ascent', Newell has abandoned his plans to shoot Noam Chomsky into space.
hint: This achievement was globally unlocked automatically for all players when Gabe Newell sent a titanium Gnome Chompski into space with Rocket Lab in 2020. You will earn this simply by launching the game.
